WITH archived AS (
  SELECT * FROM payments WHERE basket_archived = 1
),
pattern_a AS (
  SELECT 'a_card_shared' AS pattern, p.id
  FROM archived p
  JOIN (
    SELECT payment_method_fingerprint
    FROM archived
    GROUP BY payment_method_fingerprint
    HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) > 1
  ) x ON x.payment_method_fingerprint = p.payment_method_fingerprint
),
pattern_b AS (
  SELECT 'b_device_shared' AS pattern, p.id
  FROM archived p
  JOIN (
    SELECT device_fingerprint
    FROM archived
    GROUP BY device_fingerprint
    HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) > 1
  ) x ON x.device_fingerprint = p.device_fingerprint
),
pattern_c AS (
  SELECT 'c_card_device_shared' AS pattern, p.id
  FROM archived p
  JOIN (
    SELECT payment_method_fingerprint, device_fingerprint
    FROM archived
    GROUP BY payment_method_fingerprint, device_fingerprint
    HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) > 1
  ) x
    ON x.payment_method_fingerprint = p.payment_method_fingerprint
   AND x.device_fingerprint = p.device_fingerprint
),
ordered AS (
  SELECT p.*, 
         LAG(store_id) OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id ORDER BY created_at) AS prev_store_id,
         LAG(created_at) OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id ORDER BY created_at) AS prev_created_at,
         LAG(id) OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id ORDER BY created_at) AS prev_id
  FROM archived p
),
pattern_d_pairs AS (
  SELECT 'd_time_impossible' AS pattern, prev_id AS id
  FROM ordered o
  JOIN stores s1 ON s1.id = o.store_id
  JOIN stores s0 ON s0.id = o.prev_store_id
  WHERE o.prev_id IS NOT NULL
    AND o.store_id <> o.prev_store_id
    AND (strftime('%s', o.created_at) - strftime('%s', o.prev_created_at)) < 1800
    AND ((s1.lat - s0.lat)*(s1.lat - s0.lat) + (s1.lon - s0.lon)*(s1.lon - s0.lon)) > 1.0
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'd_time_impossible' AS pattern, id
  FROM ordered o
  JOIN stores s1 ON s1.id = o.store_id
  JOIN stores s0 ON s0.id = o.prev_store_id
  WHERE o.prev_id IS NOT NULL
    AND o.store_id <> o.prev_store_id
    AND (strftime('%s', o.created_at) - strftime('%s', o.prev_created_at)) < 1800
    AND ((s1.lat - s0.lat)*(s1.lat - s0.lat) + (s1.lon - s0.lon)*(s1.lon - s0.lon)) > 1.0
),
pattern_e AS (
  SELECT 'e_obs_far_from_store' AS pattern, p.id
  FROM archived p
  JOIN stores s ON s.id = p.store_id
  WHERE ((p.observed_lat - s.lat)*(p.observed_lat - s.lat) + (p.observed_lon - s.lon)*(p.observed_lon - s.lon)) > 0.25
),
pattern_f AS (
  SELECT 'f_obs_far_from_home_and_store' AS pattern, p.id
  FROM archived p
  JOIN stores s ON s.id = p.store_id
  JOIN customers c ON c.id = p.customer_id
  WHERE ((p.observed_lat - s.lat)*(p.observed_lat - s.lat) + (p.observed_lon - s.lon)*(p.observed_lon - s.lon)) > 0.25
    AND ((p.observed_lat - c.home_lat)*(p.observed_lat - c.home_lat) + (p.observed_lon - c.home_lon)*(p.observed_lon - c.home_lon)) > 0.25
),
pattern_g AS (
  SELECT 'g_obs_cluster' AS pattern, p.id
  FROM archived p
  JOIN (
    SELECT ROUND(observed_lat, 4) AS rlat, ROUND(observed_lon, 4) AS rlon
    FROM archived
    GROUP BY ROUND(observed_lat, 4), ROUND(observed_lon, 4)
    HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) > 1
  ) x
    ON ROUND(p.observed_lat, 4) = x.rlat
   AND ROUND(p.observed_lon, 4) = x.rlon
)
SELECT pattern, id
FROM (
  SELECT * FROM pattern_a
  UNION ALL SELECT * FROM pattern_b
  UNION ALL SELECT * FROM pattern_c
  UNION ALL SELECT * FROM pattern_d_pairs
  UNION ALL SELECT * FROM pattern_e
  UNION ALL SELECT * FROM pattern_f
  UNION ALL SELECT * FROM pattern_g
)
ORDER BY pattern, id;

WITH archived AS (
  SELECT * FROM payments WHERE basket_archived = 1
)
SELECT 'archived_total' AS probe, CAST(COUNT(*) AS TEXT) AS a, '' AS b, '' AS c
FROM archived
UNION ALL
SELECT 'card_share_fps', payment_method_fingerprint, CAST(COUNT(*) AS TEXT), CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) AS TEXT)
FROM archived
GROUP BY payment_method_fingerprint
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) > 1
UNION ALL
SELECT 'device_share_fps', device_fingerprint, CAST(COUNT(*) AS TEXT), CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) AS TEXT)
FROM archived
GROUP BY device_fingerprint
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) > 1
UNION ALL
SELECT 'card_device_pairs', payment_method_fingerprint || '|' || device_fingerprint, CAST(COUNT(*) AS TEXT), CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) AS TEXT)
FROM archived
GROUP BY payment_method_fingerprint, device_fingerprint
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) > 1
UNION ALL
SELECT 'coord_clusters_4dp', printf('%.4f,%.4f', ROUND(observed_lat,4), ROUND(observed_lon,4)), CAST(COUNT(*) AS TEXT), CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) AS TEXT)
FROM archived
GROUP BY ROUND(observed_lat,4), ROUND(observed_lon,4)
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) > 1
UNION ALL
SELECT 'store_delta_gt_1', '', CAST(COUNT(*) AS TEXT), ''
FROM archived a JOIN stores s ON s.id = a.store_id
WHERE ((a.observed_lat - s.lat)*(a.observed_lat - s.lat) + (a.observed_lon - s.lon)*(a.observed_lon - s.lon)) > 1.0
UNION ALL
SELECT 'home+store_delta_gt_1', '', CAST(COUNT(*) AS TEXT), ''
FROM archived a JOIN stores s ON s.id = a.store_id JOIN customers c ON c.id = a.customer_id
WHERE ((a.observed_lat - s.lat)*(a.observed_lat - s.lat) + (a.observed_lon - s.lon)*(a.observed_lon - s.lon)) > 1.0
  AND ((a.observed_lat - c.home_lat)*(a.observed_lat - c.home_lat) + (a.observed_lon - c.home_lon)*(a.observed_lon - c.home_lon)) > 1.0
ORDER BY probe, a DESC
LIMIT 200;

WITH archived AS (
  SELECT * FROM payments WHERE basket_archived = 1
),
ordered_pairs AS (
  SELECT p1.customer_id,
         p1.id AS id1,
         p1.path AS path1,
         p1.created_at AS t1,
         p1.store_id AS store1,
         p2.id AS id2,
         p2.path AS path2,
         p2.created_at AS t2,
         p2.store_id AS store2,
         ((s1.lat - s2.lat)*(s1.lat - s2.lat) + (s1.lon - s2.lon)*(s1.lon - s2.lon)) AS store_dist2,
         (julianday(p2.created_at) - julianday(p1.created_at)) * 24 * 60 AS minutes_delta
  FROM archived p1
  JOIN archived p2
    ON p1.customer_id = p2.customer_id
   AND p1.created_at < p2.created_at
   AND NOT EXISTS (
     SELECT 1 FROM archived p3
     WHERE p3.customer_id = p1.customer_id
       AND p3.created_at > p1.created_at
       AND p3.created_at < p2.created_at
   )
  JOIN stores s1 ON s1.id = p1.store_id
  JOIN stores s2 ON s2.id = p2.store_id
)
SELECT customer_id,
       COUNT(*) AS impossible_hops,
       MIN(minutes_delta) AS min_minutes,
       MAX(store_dist2) AS max_store_dist2,
       GROUP_CONCAT(id1 || '->' || id2, '; ') AS sample_pairs
FROM ordered_pairs
WHERE store_dist2 > 1.0 AND minutes_delta < 30
GROUP BY customer_id
ORDER BY impossible_hops DESC, max_store_dist2 DESC
LIMIT 50;

WITH archived AS (
  SELECT * FROM payments WHERE basket_archived = 1
),
pattern_a AS (
  SELECT 'a_card_shared' AS pattern, p.id AS payment_id
  FROM archived p
  JOIN (
    SELECT payment_method_fingerprint
    FROM archived
    GROUP BY payment_method_fingerprint
    HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) > 1
  ) x ON x.payment_method_fingerprint = p.payment_method_fingerprint
),
pattern_b AS (
  SELECT 'b_device_shared' AS pattern, p.id AS payment_id
  FROM archived p
  JOIN (
    SELECT device_fingerprint
    FROM archived
    GROUP BY device_fingerprint
    HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) > 1
  ) x ON x.device_fingerprint = p.device_fingerprint
),
pattern_c AS (
  SELECT 'c_card_device_shared' AS pattern, p.id AS payment_id
  FROM archived p
  JOIN (
    SELECT payment_method_fingerprint, device_fingerprint
    FROM archived
    GROUP BY payment_method_fingerprint, device_fingerprint
    HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) > 1
  ) x
    ON x.payment_method_fingerprint = p.payment_method_fingerprint
   AND x.device_fingerprint = p.device_fingerprint
),
ordered AS (
  SELECT p.*, 
         LAG(store_id) OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id ORDER BY created_at) AS prev_store_id,
         LAG(created_at) OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id ORDER BY created_at) AS prev_created_at,
         LAG(id) OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id ORDER BY created_at) AS prev_id
  FROM archived p
),
pattern_d_pairs AS (
  SELECT 'd_time_impossible' AS pattern, o.prev_id AS payment_id
  FROM ordered o
  JOIN stores s1 ON s1.id = o.store_id
  JOIN stores s0 ON s0.id = o.prev_store_id
  WHERE o.prev_id IS NOT NULL
    AND o.store_id <> o.prev_store_id
    AND (strftime('%s', o.created_at) - strftime('%s', o.prev_created_at)) < 1800
    AND ((s1.lat - s0.lat)*(s1.lat - s0.lat) + (s1.lon - s0.lon)*(s1.lon - s0.lon)) > 1.0
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'd_time_impossible' AS pattern, o.id AS payment_id
  FROM ordered o
  JOIN stores s1 ON s1.id = o.store_id
  JOIN stores s0 ON s0.id = o.prev_store_id
  WHERE o.prev_id IS NOT NULL
    AND o.store_id <> o.prev_store_id
    AND (strftime('%s', o.created_at) - strftime('%s', o.prev_created_at)) < 1800
    AND ((s1.lat - s0.lat)*(s1.lat - s0.lat) + (s1.lon - s0.lon)*(s1.lon - s0.lon)) > 1.0
),
pattern_e AS (
  SELECT 'e_obs_far_from_store' AS pattern, p.id AS payment_id
  FROM archived p
  JOIN stores s ON s.id = p.store_id
  WHERE ((p.observed_lat - s.lat)*(p.observed_lat - s.lat) + (p.observed_lon - s.lon)*(p.observed_lon - s.lon)) > 0.25
),
pattern_f AS (
  SELECT 'f_obs_far_from_home_and_store' AS pattern, p.id AS payment_id
  FROM archived p
  JOIN stores s ON s.id = p.store_id
  JOIN customers c ON c.id = p.customer_id
  WHERE ((p.observed_lat - s.lat)*(p.observed_lat - s.lat) + (p.observed_lon - s.lon)*(p.observed_lon - s.lon)) > 0.25
    AND ((p.observed_lat - c.home_lat)*(p.observed_lat - c.home_lat) + (p.observed_lon - c.home_lon)*(p.observed_lon - c.home_lon)) > 0.25
),
pattern_g AS (
  SELECT 'g_obs_cluster' AS pattern, p.id AS payment_id
  FROM archived p
  JOIN (
    SELECT ROUND(observed_lat, 4) AS rlat, ROUND(observed_lon, 4) AS rlon
    FROM archived
    GROUP BY ROUND(observed_lat, 4), ROUND(observed_lon, 4)
    HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) > 1
  ) x
    ON ROUND(p.observed_lat, 4) = x.rlat
   AND ROUND(p.observed_lon, 4) = x.rlon
)
SELECT pattern, payment_id
FROM (
  SELECT * FROM pattern_a
  UNION ALL SELECT * FROM pattern_b
  UNION ALL SELECT * FROM pattern_c
  UNION ALL SELECT * FROM pattern_d_pairs
  UNION ALL SELECT * FROM pattern_e
  UNION ALL SELECT * FROM pattern_f
  UNION ALL SELECT * FROM pattern_g
)
ORDER BY pattern, payment_id;

WITH archived AS (
  SELECT * FROM payments WHERE basket_archived = 1
)
SELECT 'card_shared' AS probe, payment_method_fingerprint AS key1, '' AS key2, COUNT(*) AS rows_n, COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) AS cust_n
FROM archived
GROUP BY payment_method_fingerprint
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) > 1
UNION ALL
SELECT 'device_shared' AS probe, device_fingerprint AS key1, '' AS key2, COUNT(*) AS rows_n, COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) AS cust_n
FROM archived
GROUP BY device_fingerprint
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) > 1
UNION ALL
SELECT 'card_device_shared' AS probe, payment_method_fingerprint AS key1, device_fingerprint AS key2, COUNT(*) AS rows_n, COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) AS cust_n
FROM archived
GROUP BY payment_method_fingerprint, device_fingerprint
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) > 1
UNION ALL
SELECT 'obs_cluster' AS probe, printf('%.4f', ROUND(observed_lat,4)) AS key1, printf('%.4f', ROUND(observed_lon,4)) AS key2, COUNT(*) AS rows_n, COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) AS cust_n
FROM archived
GROUP BY ROUND(observed_lat,4), ROUND(observed_lon,4)
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) > 1
ORDER BY cust_n DESC, rows_n DESC
LIMIT 50;

WITH archived AS (
  SELECT * FROM payments WHERE basket_archived = 1
),
ordered AS (
  SELECT p.*, 
         LAG(store_id) OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id ORDER BY created_at) AS prev_store_id,
         LAG(created_at) OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id ORDER BY created_at) AS prev_created_at,
         LAG(id) OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id ORDER BY created_at) AS prev_id
  FROM archived p
),
pairs AS (
  SELECT o.customer_id,
         o.prev_id AS prev_payment_id,
         o.id AS payment_id,
         o.prev_store_id,
         o.store_id,
         o.prev_created_at,
         o.created_at,
         (strftime('%s', o.created_at) - strftime('%s', o.prev_created_at)) AS delta_seconds,
         ((s1.lat - s0.lat)*(s1.lat - s0.lat) + (s1.lon - s0.lon)*(s1.lon - s0.lon)) AS store_dist2
  FROM ordered o
  JOIN stores s1 ON s1.id = o.store_id
  JOIN stores s0 ON s0.id = o.prev_store_id
  WHERE o.prev_id IS NOT NULL
    AND o.store_id <> o.prev_store_id
    AND (strftime('%s', o.created_at) - strftime('%s', o.prev_created_at)) < 1800
    AND ((s1.lat - s0.lat)*(s1.lat - s0.lat) + (s1.lon - s0.lon)*(s1.lon - s0.lon)) > 1.0
)
SELECT customer_id, prev_payment_id, payment_id, prev_store_id, store_id, prev_created_at, created_at, delta_seconds, ROUND(store_dist2,3) AS store_dist2
FROM pairs
ORDER BY customer_id, prev_created_at;

request.stdin: SELECT name, sql FROM sqlite_schema WHERE type='table' AND name IN ('payments','stores','customers') ORDER BY name;

response.stdout:
name,sql
customers,"CREATE TABLE customers (
	id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
	path TEXT NOT NULL,
	display_name TEXT NOT NULL,
	email TEXT NOT NULL,
	city TEXT NOT NULL,
	home_lat REAL NOT NULL,
	home_lon REAL NOT NULL
)"
payments,"CREATE TABLE payments (
	id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
	path TEXT NOT NULL,
	basket_id TEXT NOT NULL,
	basket_archived INTEGER NOT NULL,
	customer_id TEXT NOT NULL,
	store_id TEXT NOT NULL,
	amount_cents INTEGER NOT NULL,
	currency TEXT NOT NULL,
	status TEXT NOT NULL,
	created_at TEXT NOT NULL,
	payment_method_fingerprint TEXT NOT NULL,
	device_fingerprint TEXT NOT NULL,
	observed_lat REAL NOT NULL,
	observed_lon REAL NOT NULL,
	three_ds_status TEXT,
	three_ds_failure_reason TEXT,
	three_ds_attempts INTEGER,
	three_ds_max_attempts INTEGER,
	FOREIGN KEY (customer_id) REFERENCES customers(id),
	FOREIGN KEY (store_id) REFERENCES stores(id)
)"
stores,"CREATE TABLE stores (
	id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
	path TEXT NOT NULL,
	name TEXT NOT NULL,
	city TEXT NOT NULL,
	is_open INTEGER NOT NULL,
	lat REAL NOT NULL,
	lon REAL NOT NULL
)"

request.stdin:
WITH archived AS (
  SELECT * FROM payments WHERE basket_archived = 1
),
pat_a AS (
  SELECT 'a_card_shared' AS pattern, p.id
  FROM archived p
  JOIN (
    SELECT payment_method_fingerprint
    FROM archived
    GROUP BY payment_method_fingerprint
    HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) > 1
  ) x ON x.payment_method_fingerprint = p.payment_method_fingerprint
),
pat_b AS (
  SELECT 'b_device_shared' AS pattern, p.id
  FROM archived p
  JOIN (
    SELECT device_fingerprint
    FROM archived
    GROUP BY device_fingerprint
    HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) > 1
  ) x ON x.device_fingerprint = p.device_fingerprint
),
pat_c AS (
  SELECT 'c_card_device_shared' AS pattern, p.id
  FROM archived p
  JOIN (
    SELECT payment_method_fingerprint, device_fingerprint
    FROM archived
    GROUP BY payment_method_fingerprint, device_fingerprint
    HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) > 1
  ) x ON x.payment_method_fingerprint = p.payment_method_fingerprint
     AND x.device_fingerprint = p.device_fingerprint
),
ordered AS (
  SELECT p.*, 
         LAG(store_id) OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id ORDER BY created_at, id) AS prev_store_id,
         LAG(created_at) OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id ORDER BY created_at, id) AS prev_created_at,
         LAG(id) OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id ORDER BY created_at, id) AS prev_id
  FROM archived p
),
pat_d_pairs AS (
  SELECT o.prev_id AS id1, o.id AS id2
  FROM ordered o
  JOIN stores s1 ON s1.id = o.prev_store_id
  JOIN stores s2 ON s2.id = o.store_id
  WHERE o.prev_id IS NOT NULL
    AND o.prev_store_id <> o.store_id
    AND (ABS(s1.lat - s2.lat) > 1.0 OR ABS(s1.lon - s2.lon) > 1.0)
    AND (strftime('%s', o.created_at) - strftime('%s', o.prev_created_at)) < 1800
),
pat_d AS (
  SELECT 'd_time_impossible' AS pattern, id1 AS id FROM pat_d_pairs
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'd_time_impossible' AS pattern, id2 AS id FROM pat_d_pairs
),
pat_e AS (
  SELECT 'e_observed_vs_store' AS pattern, p.id
  FROM archived p
  JOIN stores s ON s.id = p.store_id
  WHERE ((p.observed_lat - s.lat)*(p.observed_lat - s.lat) + (p.observed_lon - s.lon)*(p.observed_lon - s.lon)) > 0.25
),
pat_f AS (
  SELECT 'f_observed_vs_home_and_store' AS pattern, p.id
  FROM archived p
  JOIN stores s ON s.id = p.store_id
  JOIN customers c ON c.id = p.customer_id
  WHERE ((p.observed_lat - s.lat)*(p.observed_lat - s.lat) + (p.observed_lon - s.lon)*(p.observed_lon - s.lon)) > 0.25
    AND ((p.observed_lat - c.home_lat)*(p.observed_lat - c.home_lat) + (p.observed_lon - c.home_lon)*(p.observed_lon - c.home_lon)) > 0.25
),
pat_g AS (
  SELECT 'g_repeated_observed_cluster' AS pattern, p.id
  FROM archived p
  JOIN (
    SELECT ROUND(observed_lat, 4) AS rlat, ROUND(observed_lon, 4) AS rlon
    FROM archived
    GROUP BY ROUND(observed_lat, 4), ROUND(observed_lon, 4)
    HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) > 1
  ) x ON ROUND(p.observed_lat, 4) = x.rlat AND ROUND(p.observed_lon, 4) = x.rlon
)
SELECT pattern, id
FROM (
  SELECT * FROM pat_a
  UNION ALL SELECT * FROM pat_b
  UNION ALL SELECT * FROM pat_c
  UNION ALL SELECT * FROM pat_d
  UNION ALL SELECT * FROM pat_e
  UNION ALL SELECT * FROM pat_f

WITH archived AS (
  SELECT * FROM payments WHERE basket_archived = 1
),
ordered AS (
  SELECT p.*, 
         LAG(store_id) OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id ORDER BY created_at) AS prev_store_id,
         LAG(created_at) OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id ORDER BY created_at) AS prev_created_at,
         LAG(id) OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id ORDER BY created_at) AS prev_id
  FROM archived p
),
pairs AS (
  SELECT o.customer_id, o.prev_id AS payment_id
  FROM ordered o
  JOIN stores s1 ON s1.id = o.store_id
  JOIN stores s0 ON s0.id = o.prev_store_id
  WHERE o.prev_id IS NOT NULL
    AND o.store_id <> o.prev_store_id
    AND (strftime('%s', o.created_at) - strftime('%s', o.prev_created_at)) < 1800
    AND ((s1.lat - s0.lat)*(s1.lat - s0.lat) + (s1.lon - s0.lon)*(s1.lon - s0.lon)) > 1.0
  UNION
  SELECT o.customer_id, o.id AS payment_id
  FROM ordered o
  JOIN stores s1 ON s1.id = o.store_id
  JOIN stores s0 ON s0.id = o.prev_store_id
  WHERE o.prev_id IS NOT NULL
    AND o.store_id <> o.prev_store_id
    AND (strftime('%s', o.created_at) - strftime('%s', o.prev_created_at)) < 1800
    AND ((s1.lat - s0.lat)*(s1.lat - s0.lat) + (s1.lon - s0.lon)*(s1.lon - s0.lon)) > 1.0
)
SELECT customer_id, COUNT(DISTINCT payment_id) AS n
FROM pairs
GROUP BY customer_id
UNION ALL
SELECT 'TOTAL', COUNT(DISTINCT payment_id)
FROM pairs;

WITH archived AS (
  SELECT * FROM payments WHERE basket_archived = 1
)
SELECT ROUND(observed_lat,4) AS rlat,
       ROUND(observed_lon,4) AS rlon,
       COUNT(*) AS payments,
       COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) AS customers,
       GROUP_CONCAT(id, '|') AS payment_ids
FROM archived
GROUP BY ROUND(observed_lat,4), ROUND(observed_lon,4)
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) > 1
ORDER BY customers DESC, payments DESC
LIMIT 20;

WITH archived AS (
  SELECT * FROM payments WHERE basket_archived = 1
)
SELECT 'card' AS kind,
       payment_method_fingerprint AS fingerprint,
       COUNT(*) AS payments,
       COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) AS customers,
       GROUP_CONCAT(id, '|') AS payment_ids
FROM archived
GROUP BY payment_method_fingerprint
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) > 1
UNION ALL
SELECT 'device' AS kind,
       device_fingerprint AS fingerprint,
       COUNT(*) AS payments,
       COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) AS customers,
       GROUP_CONCAT(id, '|') AS payment_ids
FROM archived
GROUP BY device_fingerprint
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) > 1
UNION ALL
SELECT 'card_device' AS kind,
       payment_method_fingerprint || '|' || device_fingerprint AS fingerprint,
       COUNT(*) AS payments,
       COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) AS customers,
       GROUP_CONCAT(id, '|') AS payment_ids
FROM archived
GROUP BY payment_method_fingerprint, device_fingerprint
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) > 1
ORDER BY customers DESC, payments DESC
LIMIT 50;

WITH archived AS (
  SELECT * FROM payments WHERE basket_archived = 1
),
ordered AS (
  SELECT p.*, 
         LAG(store_id) OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id ORDER BY created_at, id) AS prev_store_id,
         LAG(created_at) OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id ORDER BY created_at, id) AS prev_created_at,
         LAG(id) OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id ORDER BY created_at, id) AS prev_id
  FROM archived p
),
jumps AS (
  SELECT o.customer_id,
         o.prev_id,
         o.id,
         o.prev_created_at,
         o.created_at,
         o.prev_store_id,
         o.store_id,
         ABS(s1.lat - s2.lat) AS dlat,
         ABS(s1.lon - s2.lon) AS dlon,
         (strftime('%s', o.created_at) - strftime('%s', o.prev_created_at)) AS delta_seconds
  FROM ordered o
  JOIN stores s1 ON s1.id = o.prev_store_id
  JOIN stores s2 ON s2.id = o.store_id
  WHERE o.prev_id IS NOT NULL
    AND o.prev_store_id <> o.store_id
    AND (ABS(s1.lat - s2.lat) > 1.0 OR ABS(s1.lon - s2.lon) > 1.0)
    AND (strftime('%s', o.created_at) - strftime('%s', o.prev_created_at)) < 1800
)
SELECT customer_id,
       COUNT(*) AS jump_count,
       GROUP_CONCAT(prev_id || '->' || id, '|') AS transitions
FROM jumps
GROUP BY customer_id
ORDER BY jump_count DESC, customer_id
LIMIT 20;
